nodes.name: Cisticola
nodes.summary: Cisticola（Cisticola）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联53种鸟类，如Whistling cisticola、Chattering cisticola、Trilling cisticola等53种鸟类。

nodes.name: Red-pate cisticola
nodes.summary: Red-pate cisticola（Cisticola ruficeps）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如Red-pate cisticola。

nodes.name: Red-pate cisticola
nodes.summary: The red-pate cisticola (Cisticola ruficeps) is a species of bird in the family Cisticolidae. It is found in Benin, Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Ivory Coast, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Gambia, Ghana, Guinea-Bissau, Kenya, Mali, Niger, Nigeria, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Sudan, Togo, and Uganda. Its natural habitats are dry savanna and swamps. References
